query:
SELECT 
  c.id, 
  c.code, 
  c.title, 
  COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count,
  c.description
FROM bridge_academy_courses c
LEFT JOIN bridge_academy_lessons l ON c.id = l.course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title, c.description
ORDER BY c.code;
